data.name: Made in Tower
data.detailed_description:
-Challenge the Tower alone, challenge countless characters corrupted by the Tower, and obtain unique relics to challenge stronger enemies.
-More than 50 items that can be found.
-More than 50 completely different battles.
-Unpredictable and mysterious events can help you or hurt you badly.
-Every floor may be cursed.
-Obtain more powerful props by defeating BOSS.
-You must constantly improve yourself.
-Stay stronger and challenge higher floors.
data.about_the_game:

data.supported_languages:
簡體中文*, 英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GTS 450
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GTX 750 Ti
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
